response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks — aligning well with the core stack and responsibilities. His open-source contributions and architectural versatility demonstrate deep engineering craftsmanship. However, his lack of explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience and limited mention of Kotlin/Java in recent roles are minor gaps, and his German language proficiency is basic, which may affect collaboration in a Berlin-based team.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS
Hands-on experience with AI-agent systems and MCP frameworks
Strong open-source contributions and testing culture (Vitest-like tools, TDD)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in recent work
Kotlin/Java experience is outdated or not recent
Basic German proficiency may limit seamless team integration in Berlin
